eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Albany, WY; at 11:38 AM ON MAR 12, 2026 Effective until 12:38 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: There is a fire in the area, evacuations are taking place from Garbielson Ln to Harmony, and houses to the north to Mortenson.  Please evacuate the area ASAP. Evacuate the area immidediately.
